phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove iniziano i caruggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh in-ee-TSAH-noh ee kah-ROOJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il mercato storico, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel mer-KAH-toh STOH-ree-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, è sicuro camminare qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee eh see-KOO-roh KAHM-mee-NAH-reh kwee, pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is safe during the day.

responses.english: Yes, it is safe during the day.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete una mappa della zona, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh ah-VEH-teh OO-nah MAHP-pah DEL-lah DZOH-nah pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Le mappe sono disponibili al punto informazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: LEH MAHP-peh SOH-noh dee-spoh-nee-BEE-lee AHL POON-toh een-fohr-mah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: Maps are available at the information point.

responses.english: Maps are available at the information point.
responses.phonetic: LEH MAHP-peh SOH-noh dee-spoh-nee-BEE-lee AHL POON-toh een-fohr-mah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.local: Le mappe sono disponibili al punto informazioni.
